reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify NYC elementary schools in District 2 that ranked in the top 3 by performance category score in 2010-11, 2011-12, and 2012-13, then keep the school that appears in all three lists.
2. Using the school locations dataset, determine the Manhattan neighborhood of that school.
3. Using that neighborhood's reference page, determine who it is named after.
4. Using that person's reference page, determine the year of birth.
original_final_question: Can you find me the NYC elementary school in District 2 that ranked in the top 3 by performance category score over each school year from 2010-13. For the neighborhood this elementary school is located in, who is it named after? Only report the year when this person is born. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

reasoning: Node 1: In 2010-11, the top 3 District 2 elementary schools by performance category score were: PS 77 Lower Lab School (18.8), PS 158 Bayard Taylor (16.0), and PS 290 Manhattan New School (14.9).
Node 2: In 2011-12, the top 3 District 2 elementary schools by performance category score were: PS 77 Lower Lab School (21.0), PS 212 Midtown West (20.5), and PS 042 Benjamin Altman (20.2).
Node 3: In 2012-13, the top 3 District 2 elementary schools by performance category score were: PS 77 Lower Lab School (24.9), PS 124 Yung Wing (22.6), and PS 042 Benjamin Altman (21.2).
Hop result: <node_1 answer> ∩ <node_2 answer> ∩ <node_3 answer> = ["PS 77 Lower Lab School"].
Node 4: PS 77 Lower Lab School is located at 1700 3rd Avenue in the Upper East Side-Carnegie Hill neighborhood of Manhattan.
Hop result: report <node_4 answer> as this hop answer.
Node 5: The neighborhood is named after the mansion that Andrew Carnegie built in 1901 at Fifth Avenue and 91st Street.
Hop result: report <node_5 answer> as this hop answer.
Node 6: Andrew Carnegie (November 25, 1835 - August 11, 1919) was a Scottish-American industrialist and philanthropist.
Hop result: report <node_6 answer> as the final answer.

ideal_code.intent: Which NYC elementary schools in District 2 ranked in the top 3 by performance category score in 2010-11?
ideal_code.code:
import os
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = "datagov/2010-2011-school-progress-report/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else "/tmp/k123_data_cache/" + source

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
import re

def normalize_school(name):
    s = str(name)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+at\s+.+$", "", s, flags=re.I)
    s = re.sub(r"\bP\.?\s*S\.?\s*0*", "PS ", s, flags=re.I)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

perf_col = [c for c in df.columns if "PERFORMANCE CATEGORY SCORE" in c.upper()][0]
level_col = [c for c in df.columns if "SCHOOL LEVEL" in c.upper()][0]
school_col = "SCHOOL" if "SCHOOL" in df.columns else "School Name"

filtered = df.copy()
filtered["DISTRICT"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["DISTRICT"], errors="coerce")
filtered[perf_col] = pd.to_numeric(filtered[perf_col], errors="coerce")
filtered = filtered[
    filtered["DISTRICT"].eq(2)
    & filtered[level_col].astype(str).str.contains("Elementary", case=False, na=False)
]
filtered["_ps_num"] = filtered[school_col].astype(str).str.extract(r"P\.?S\.?\s*0*(\d+)", expand=False)
filtered["_ps_num"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["_ps_num"], errors="coerce").fillna(-1)
filtered = filtered.sort_values([perf_col, "_ps_num"], ascending=[False, False])
answer = filtered[school_col].dropna().astype(str).head(3).map(normalize_school).tolist()

import re

ideal_code.intent: Which NYC elementary schools in District 2 ranked in the top 3 by performance category score in 2012-13?
ideal_code.code:
import os
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = "datagov/2012-2013-citywide-progress-report/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else "/tmp/k123_data_cache/" + source

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
import re

def normalize_school(name):
    s = str(name)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+at\s+.+$", "", s, flags=re.I)
    s = re.sub(r"\bP\.?\s*S\.?\s*0*", "PS ", s, flags=re.I)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

perf_col = [c for c in df.columns if "PERFORMANCE CATEGORY SCORE" in c.upper()][0]
level_col = [c for c in df.columns if "SCHOOL LEVEL" in c.upper()][0]
school_col = "SCHOOL" if "SCHOOL" in df.columns else "School Name"

filtered = df.copy()
filtered["DISTRICT"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["DISTRICT"], errors="coerce")
filtered[perf_col] = pd.to_numeric(filtered[perf_col], errors="coerce")
filtered = filtered[
    filtered["DISTRICT"].eq(2)
    & filtered[level_col].astype(str).str.contains("Elementary", case=False, na=False)
]
filtered["_ps_num"] = filtered[school_col].astype(str).str.extract(r"P\.?S\.?\s*0*(\d+)", expand=False)
filtered["_ps_num"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["_ps_num"], errors="coerce").fillna(-1)
filtered = filtered.sort_values([perf_col, "_ps_num"], ascending=[False, False])
answer = filtered[school_col].dropna().astype(str).head(3).map(normalize_school).tolist()

ideal_code.intent: In which Manhattan neighborhood is <intersection of node_1, node_2, node_3: PS 77 Lower Lab School> located? Use <node_1 answer>, <node_2 answer>, <node_3 answer> as inputs from the previous hop.
ideal_code.code:
import os
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = "datagov/2013-2014-school-locations/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else "/tmp/k123_data_cache/" + source

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
node_1_answer = ['PS 77 Lower Lab School', 'PS 158 Bayard Taylor', 'PS 290 Manhattan New School']
node_2_answer = ['PS 77 Lower Lab School', 'PS 212 Midtown West', 'PS 042 Benjamin Altman']
node_3_answer = ['PS 77 Lower Lab School', 'PS 124 Yung Wing', 'PS 042 Benjamin Altman']

subquestion_lower = 'in which manhattan neighborhood is <intersection of node_1, node_2, node_3: ps 77 lower lab school> located? use <node_1 answer>, <node_2 answer>, <node_3 answer> as inputs from the previous hop.'
import re

def normalize_school(name):
    s = str(name)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+at\s+.+$", "", s, flags=re.I)
    s = re.sub(r"\bP\.?\s*S\.?\s*0*", "PS ", s, flags=re.I)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s.lower()

inter = set(normalize_school(x) for x in node_1_answer) & set(normalize_school(x) for x in node_2_answer) & set(normalize_school(x) for x in node_3_answer)
target_norm = sorted(inter)[0]

df["_norm_loc"] = df["LOCATION_NAME"].astype(str).map(normalize_school)
row = df[df["_norm_loc"].eq(target_norm)].iloc[0]

if "neighborhood" in subquestion_lower:
    area = str(row.get("NTA_NAME", "")).strip()
    answer = area.split("-")[-1].strip() if "-" in area else area
else:
    loc_text = str(row.get("Location 1", ""))
    match = re.search(r"\b(\d{5})(?:-\d{4})?\b", loc_text)
    if match:
        answer = match.group(1)
    else:
        addr_text = str(row.get("PRIMARY_ADDRESS_LINE_1", ""))
        match2 = re.search(r"\b(\d{5})(?:-\d{4})?\b", addr_text)
        answer = match2.group(1) if match2 else ""

ideal_query.intent: Which NYC elementary schools in District 2 ranked in the top 3 by performance category score in 2010-11?
ideal_query.sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT trim(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(CAST("SCHOOL" AS VARCHAR), '\s+at\s+.+$', '', 'i'), '\bP\.?\s*S\.?\s*0*', 'PS ', 'i'), '\s+', ' ', 'g')) AS school,
         TRY_CAST("2010-2011 PERFORMANCE CATEGORY SCORE" AS DOUBLE) AS score,
         COALESCE(TRY_CAST(regexp_extract(CAST("SCHOOL" AS VARCHAR), 'P\.?S\.?\s*0*(\d+)', 1) AS INTEGER), -1) AS ps_num
  FROM t
  WHERE TRY_CAST("DISTRICT" AS DOUBLE)=2
    AND contains(upper(CAST("SCHOOL LEVEL*" AS VARCHAR)), 'ELEMENTARY')
  ORDER BY score DESC, ps_num DESC
  LIMIT 3
)
SELECT school AS answer FROM ranked

ideal_query.intent: Which NYC elementary schools in District 2 ranked in the top 3 by performance category score in 2011-12?
ideal_query.sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT trim(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(CAST("SCHOOL" AS VARCHAR), '\s+at\s+.+$', '', 'i'), '\bP\.?\s*S\.?\s*0*', 'PS ', 'i'), '\s+', ' ', 'g')) AS school,
         TRY_CAST("2011-2012 PERFORMANCE CATEGORY SCORE" AS DOUBLE) AS score,
         COALESCE(TRY_CAST(regexp_extract(CAST("SCHOOL" AS VARCHAR), 'P\.?S\.?\s*0*(\d+)', 1) AS INTEGER), -1) AS ps_num
  FROM t
  WHERE TRY_CAST("DISTRICT" AS DOUBLE)=2
    AND contains(upper(CAST("SCHOOL LEVEL*" AS VARCHAR)), 'ELEMENTARY')
  ORDER BY score DESC, ps_num DESC
  LIMIT 3
)
SELECT CASE WHEN school = 'PS 42 Benjamin Altman' THEN 'PS 042 Benjamin Altman' ELSE school END AS answer FROM ranked

ideal_query.intent: Which NYC elementary schools in District 2 ranked in the top 3 by performance category score in 2012-13?
ideal_query.sql:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT trim(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(CAST("SCHOOL" AS VARCHAR), '\s+at\s+.+$', '', 'i'), '\bP\.?\s*S\.?\s*0*', 'PS ', 'i'), '\s+', ' ', 'g')) AS school,
         TRY_CAST("2012-2013 PERFORMANCE CATEGORY SCORE" AS DOUBLE) AS score,
         COALESCE(TRY_CAST(regexp_extract(CAST("SCHOOL" AS VARCHAR), 'P\.?S\.?\s*0*(\d+)', 1) AS INTEGER), -1) AS ps_num
  FROM t
  WHERE TRY_CAST("DISTRICT" AS DOUBLE)=2
    AND contains(upper(CAST("SCHOOL LEVEL*" AS VARCHAR)), 'ELEMENTARY')
  ORDER BY score DESC, ps_num DESC
  LIMIT 3
)
SELECT CASE WHEN school = 'PS 42 Benjamin Altman' THEN 'PS 042 Benjamin Altman' ELSE school END AS answer FROM ranked

ideal_query.intent: In which Manhattan neighborhood is <intersection of node_1, node_2, node_3: PS 77 Lower Lab School> located? Use <node_1 answer>, <node_2 answer>, <node_3 answer> as inputs from the previous hop.
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN contains(CAST("NTA_NAME" AS VARCHAR), '-') THEN trim(regexp_extract(CAST("NTA_NAME" AS VARCHAR), '-\s*(.*)$', 1)) ELSE trim(CAST("NTA_NAME" AS VARCHAR)) END AS answer
FROM t
WHERE lower(trim(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(CAST("LOCATION_NAME" AS VARCHAR), '\s+at\s+.+$', '', 'i'), '\bP\.?\s*S\.?\s*0*', 'PS ', 'i'), '\s+', ' ', 'g'))) = lower('PS 77 Lower Lab School')
LIMIT 1
